Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class ChangeEventHeader

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.ChangeEventHeader
public class ChangeEventHeader extends Object

Java class for ChangeEventHeader complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ChangeEventHeader">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="entityName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="recordIds" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" maxOccurs="unbounded"/>
         <element name="commitTimestamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}long"/>
         <element name="commitNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}long"/>
         <element name="commitUser" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="diffFields" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="changeType" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}changeEventType"/>
         <element name="changeOrigin" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="transactionKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="sequenceNumber" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="nulledFields" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="changedFields" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

  • Method Details

    • getEntityName

      public String getEntityName()
      Gets the value of the entityName property.
      Returns:
      possible object is String

    • setEntityName

      public void setEntityName(String value)
      Sets the value of the entityName property.
      Parameters:
      value - allowed object is String

    • getRecordIds

      public List<String> getRecordIds()
      Gets the value of the recordIds property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the recordIds property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getRecordIds().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list String

      Returns:
      The value of the recordIds property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the diffFields property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows:

      public List<String> getNulledFields()
      Gets the value of the nulledFields property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the nulledFields property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getNulledFields().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list String

      Returns:
      The value of the nulledFields property.

      public List<String> getChangedFields()
      Gets the value of the changedFields property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the changedFields property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getChangedFields().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list String

      Returns:
      The value of the changedFields property.
